title: Screens UI
scenario: Onboarding flow screens do not match Figma UI design specifications
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or clear app data to reset onboarding).
Observe the first Onboarding screen (Welcome / Get Started).
Swipe or tap 'Next' to advance through each Onboarding screen in sequence.

For each screen, compare the following against the Figma UI design:
  - Layout and element positioning
  - Typography (font, size, weight)
  - Colors and icons
  - Button labels and behavior
  - Illustrations and imagery
  - Text copy
Continue until the final Onboarding screen (e.g., 'Let's Go' or 'Finish').
Tap the final CTA button to exit onboarding and enter the Home screen.
expected: Every Onboarding screen matches the Figma UI design exactly in layout, typography, colors, icons, illustrations, and text copy.
